# 🛠️ Contributing to [terminalweb] – Welcome to the Team!

Hi! Great to have you on board. To keep our codebase clean and prevent us from accidentally overwriting each other's work, we all follow a few simple rules.

---

## 1. Issue First, Code Second
* Before building a new feature or fixing a major bug, check the **Issues** tab.
* If there isn't an issue for it yet, please create one (use our templates for bugs or features).
* Assign the issue to yourself or leave a quick comment so nobody ends up doing the same work twice.

## 2. Never Push Directly to the `main` Branch!
* Our `main` branch is sacred and should only contain working code.
* Create a separate branch from `main` for **every** task you work on.
* **Branch Naming Conventions:**
  * `feature/name-of-feature` (e.g., `feature/login-page`)
  * `fix/name-of-bug` (e.g., `fix/button-responsive`)

## 3. Pull Requests & Code Reviews
* Once your work is done, push your branch and open a **Pull Request (PR)** into the `main` branch.
* Briefly describe what changes you made.
* **Note:** You cannot merge your own code. At least one other team member (or the project lead) must review your code, give feedback, and approve the PR.

## 4. Code Style & Cleanliness
* Name variables and functions clearly so others understand what they do (e.g., `let userCart = []` instead of `let x = []`).
* Use comments in your code if a function gets a bit complex.
* Before pushing, quickly test your changes locally in `tests.html` to make sure everything still works and the console is free of errors!

---

Thanks for following the guidelines. Let's build something awesome together! 🚀
